known_cause: NON-FUNDAMENTAL: AMD rose 10.7% to close at $181.86 the day after Nvidia reported blowout fiscal Q4 earnings. No AMD-specific news; the move was pure read-through optimism that AI capex strength would benefit AMD as the #2 GPU vendor. Non-fundamental — a near-replay of the May 2023 Nvidia-sympathy pattern, where AMD reacted to a competitor's earnings rather than to any change in AMD's contracts, products, or guidance.
